attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Patient age (41) inferred — the source note gives no age; working-age adult inferred from a Long COVID/ME/CFS phenotype with a live-in partner. Confirm on clinician review.

Patient sex (female) inferred — the source note does not state sex; female inferred (ME/CFS and Long COVID are markedly more common in females) for the required demographics field. Confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context (RA1_major_city) inferred with no explicit signal in the source; confirm on clinician review.

Specialty assigned ID (Infectious Disease) as the closest allowed specialty_tag for a post-viral (Long COVID/ME/CFS) phenotype, mirroring the post-viral arboviral precedent; reviewer may prefer GP, NEURDV (Neurodevelopmental & Rehabilitation) or REHAB.
Difficulty assigned red_herring_laden: an alarming stroke-mimicking presentation (acute aphasia, collapse) that is actually a benign-cause PEM crash — the classic over-triage / anchoring trap.
Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-ID-03-00225) — maintainer / ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-ID-03 bucket.

Tier decision: correct_baseline_tier T2, minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1. This is an OVER-TRIAGE-RESISTANCE case — known Long COVID/ME/CFS with a clear exertional trigger and a NEGATIVE acute red-flag screen (global/symmetrical non-focal deficit, afebrile, stable, rousable); the source's own disposition was supported home radical rest + telehealth follow-up, explicitly judging that an ED transfer would worsen the crash. Deliberately NOT floored above T2 on a 'telehealth cannot examine' argument; the residual un-examinable stroke risk is handled by explicit FAST safety-netting (ESC-001) to 000. Over-triage to T3+ (ED/000) is the scored defect.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present clinician home visit (neurological examination, measured vitals, cervical lymph-node palpation). Clinician-only findings sealed into node 10 telehealth_limits and node 11 (physical_sign, cannot_be_elicited_via_telehealth / requires_physical_examination); patient/carer-observable findings (symmetry/FAST-negative, level of consciousness, no fever to touch, fluids tolerated, passing urine) placed in 01.objective_data_offered with verified:false.

No doses synthesised: the source note gives no drug doses for the crash (explicitly 'no acute pharmaceutical cure'). Electrolyte solution and PRN paracetamol recorded without invented doses; LDN/NAD+/CoQ10/Wahls recorded as later-consideration options (not_indicated_here / weak-or-no-evidence), and graded exercise + stimulants recorded as errors of commission.

All candidate codes are best-effort and UNVERIFIED; a specific SNOMED concept for 'post-exertional malaise' was intentionally not fabricated — the terminology server should confirm/extend the codes_manifest.
All hashes null (never chat-computed); all codes unverified_pending_terminology_receipt.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
